# All Miles Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.
![All Miles Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankstagePWS/all-miles-credit-card-desktop-banner?fmt=webp-alpha)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank All Miles Credit Cardeffective 15th May 2026.
What's in store for you

![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Card Benefits and Features
### Banking Benefits
  * Enabled* for Contactless Payments at retail outlets.*
  * CashBack equivalent to the first year's fee on initial spending.*
  * 50-day revolving credit available at a nominal interest rate.*
  * 1% Fuel Surcharge waived off on fuel transactions*


View More 
![All miles credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Reward Point Benefits
  * 3X Reward Points for every ₹150 you spend.
  * 2X Reward Points for hotel bookings, mobile recharge and shopping.


![All miles credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Card Management Benefits
  * Protection against unauthorised use when you shop with the EMV Chip Card technology.
  * Zero lost card liability available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre.


View More 
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Management & Controls
  2. ### Fees & Charges
  3. ### Contactless Payment
  4. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  Card Management & Controls 
  * One unified platform for managing Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag, and Business Loans.


  * Simple, intuitive interface to monitor and manage all your business expenses.


  * Effortlessly view and redeem reward points with just a click.


![Additional Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Charges 
  * A fee of 2.5%, with a minimum of ₹ 500, is applicable on all cash withdrawals on your card
  * Finance charge: 3.49% per month


  * Free first-year membership fee if you spend ₹15,000 within the first 90 days.
  * Free membership renewal if you spend ₹1,00,000 in a year.


Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/all-miles-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to view details of the fees and charges
![Milestone Benefit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless Payment 
  * All Miles Card is enabled* for Contactless Payments at retail outlets. 


(Note: in India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder must enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons. You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.) 
![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/all-miles-credit-card/pdfs/tnc.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is All Miles credit Card? 
The All **Miles Credit Card i** s a rewards Credit Card that allows you to earn significant reward points on all your purchases, especially on travel, dining and shopping-related spends.
###  What is the All Miles Credit Card limit?
The credit limit on the All Miles Credit Card is determined by HDFC Bank based on your individual eligibility, income and credit worthiness.
###  How to apply for All Miles Credit Card? 
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank All Miles Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other credit cards that may suit your needs. Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
